title: migration script tolerates missing bug_ticket_comments
description:
## Summary
Hit during the live korczewski migration: \`bugs.bug_ticket_comments\` only gets lazy-created when an admin appends a comment, which never happened on korczewski. Migration now uses \`to_regclass\` to detect absence and falls back to an empty comments list.

## Test plan
- Mentolder migration already ran successfully with the unpatched script (it had the table).
- Korczewski migration ran successfully with this patch (5/5 bug rows migrated; 0 comments to copy).

🤖 Generated with [Claude Code](https://claude.com/claude-code)
